query:
ALTER TABLE fitasty_products 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS product_name_zh VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Unknown',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS product_name_en VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS brand_name VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS serving_size INT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS serving_unit VARCHAR(50),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS protein_g INT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS carbs_g INT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fat_g INT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fiber_g INT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sugar_g INT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sodium_mg INT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS barcode VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS product_image_url VARCHAR(500),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS is_featured TINYINT DEFAULT 0;
